title: Sci Fi
sourceTitle: Sci Fi Raw Sref 1923794060 That Style
prompt:
sci-fi --raw --sref 1923794060

That style reference gives it the retro sci-fi look I love.

I created the entire 1:30 video with just 3 images. Honestly, I could’ve done it with just one.

The trick is extending the video. It’s a feature in Mitte that lets you generate a new clip from the last frame, so you can keep the story going as long as you want. Just add a prompt and let it flow.

I went with 10-second clips to keep the pacing tight.

Hope you liked it.

sci-fi --raw --sref 1923794060

That style reference gives it the retro sci-fi look I love.

I created the entire 1:30 video with just 3 images. Honestly, I could’ve done it with just one.

The trick is extending the video. It’s a feature in Mitte that lets you generate a new clip from the last frame, so you can keep the story going as long as you want. Just add a prompt and let it flow.

I went with 10-second clips to keep the pacing tight.

Hope you liked it.
